assertions.description: INCORRECT: azalea_azalea.sch.json reports four I2C bus entries. Two are legitimate (I2C0_SDA and I2C0_SCL on the LPC4330 MCU). The other two are false positives: the net 'USB1_D+' is reported as SCL for U1 (LPC4330FBD144), and 'P2_4' is reported as SDA. USB1_D+ is a USB full-speed/high-speed differential signal and has nothing to do with I2C. This false positive likely occurs because the LPC4330 has multiplexed pins where the USB D+ pin's KiCad symbol pin name contains 'SCL' as an alternate function label.
